semantic.role: Defines the automated placeholder publishing step to reserve the ArchSpine npm package name before real releases.
responsibilities: Verifying package.json name and version matches placeholder expectations
Checking if the package name is already taken on the npm registry
Running the release gate script before publishing
Publishing a placeholder version 0.0.1 to secure the package name
outOfScope: Handling actual version bumps or stable releases
User interaction or error recovery procedures
Publishing to registries other than npmjs.org

English.purpose: This document is a CI script that automates the placeholder publishing process for the ArchSpine npm package. Its goal is to secure the package name on the official npm registry before any real releases begin, ensuring the name is not taken by another publisher.
English.context_and_audience: This script is intended for maintainers and CI pipeline developers working on the ArchSpine project. It is run as a one-time setup step before the first real release, or whenever the package name needs to be reserved again.
key_takeaways: The script strictly enforces a placeholder version (0.0.1) to prevent accidental exposure of real code.
It performs a registry lookup to avoid publishing over an existing package with the same name.
It integrates with the project's release gate to ensure quality checks pass before publishing.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是一个CI脚本，用于自动化ArchSpine npm包的占位发布过程。其主要目的是在实际发布开始之前，在官方npm注册表上锁定包名，确保该名称不会被其他发布者占用。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 该脚本面向ArchSpine项目的维护者和CI流水线开发者。它作为首次发布前的一次性设置步骤运行，或当需要重新保留包名时使用。
key_takeaways: 脚本严格执行占位版本（0.0.1），防止意外暴露真实代码。
通过注册表查询避免发布到已存在的同名包。
与项目的发布门控集成，确保发布前通过质量检查。
